description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a robust, angular hull and a prominent rotating turret mounted centrally on top. The tank features a long, cylindrical main cannon extending from the turret, with additional details such as hatches, periscopes, and surface texturing visible on the upper surfaces. The sides and lower hull are protected by thick, rectangular armor plates, and the vehicle moves on wide, continuous metal tracks with visible tread patterns. The exterior is finished in a dark olive green color, giving it a utilitarian and intimidating appearance. No visible camouflage patterns, military markings, or insignia are present on the hull or turret. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A large, dark green armored tank with a central turret, long cannon, and thick side armor plates, riding on wide metal tracks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, the long cannon, and the thick, rectangular side armor plates.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide tracks, rear armor, and the back of the turret with visible hatches.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tank's length, turret, and side armor, mirroring view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main cannon, sloped front armor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, rectangular armor plates on the sides and sloped armor on the front; armor appears robust and continuous.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color; no camouflage pattern visible.
